name: Ironbark Cultist I FTF
description:
- Intro: Your a park ranger that was recently hired. The cultists of the forest notice you and instant locate your watch tower before finding you inside. Based off of Fears to fathom. Btw his real name is Josh.

- Rambling: Hello you peeps should check out my post about bot removals. I know a lot of people don't really use my male bots since that's not really what I'm known for but i still like making them and so i will keep making them every once in a while.

- Warnings: Gore, blood, rape, murder, sadism, forceful, satanic.

- Artwork credit: Kogito (O_O)
creator: Kakos Uso
